title: Alphabet stock pops on report it's developing a more efficient AI chip
summary: Alphabet's stock rose on reports of developing 'Frozen v2,' an AI chip that embeds Gemini's architecture directly into silicon for greater efficiency. This custom chip design could reduce dependence on external suppliers and improve AI system performance.
content: The new AI chip, called "Frozen v2," would embed parts of Gemini's architecture directly into the silicon, according to the report.

zh.title: 谷歌股票因开发更高效AI芯片报告而上涨
zh.summary: 谷歌股票因开发"Frozen v2"的报告而上升,该AI芯片将Gemini架构直接嵌入硅中以提高效率。这种定制芯片设计可以减少对外部供应商的依赖并改善AI系统性能。

title: Forget Nvidia. These 5 S&P 500 stocks are quietly going all in on AI.
summary: Five S&P 500 stocks beyond the 'Magnificent Seven' are making significant AI investments, drawing sharp investor attention away from mega-cap concentration. The diversification reflects growing interest in AI exposure across broader market segments.
content: The “Mag Seven” has become the “Bag Seven.” Sharp tech investors are looking elsewhere.

zh.title: 忘掉英伟达。这5只标普500股票正在悄悄全力投入AI
zh.summary: 五只超越"七巨头"的标普500股票正在进行重大AI投资,吸引投资者的注意力远离大市值集中。这种多元化反映了对AI敞口在更广泛市场部分中日益增长的兴趣。

title: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal products
summary: The EU issued a record €550 million fine to AliExpress for failing to prevent unsafe toys and counterfeit clothing from being sold on its platform. The penalty reflects escalating regulatory enforcement against major marketplaces for product compliance failures.
content: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.

zh.title: 速卖通因允许销售非法产品被欧盟罚款5.5亿欧元创纪录
zh.summary: 欧盟因速卖通未能阻止不安全玩具和假冒服装在其平台上销售而罚款5.5亿欧元创纪录。这一处罚反映了针对主要在线市场产品合规失败的监管执法不断升级。

title: As the battle for AI supremacy intensifies, Trump White House reportedly contemplates a ban on Chinese models
summary: The Trump administration is reportedly considering banning Chinese AI models, which deliver comparable capabilities at a fraction of U.S. competitors' costs. Such a ban would protect American AI companies like Anthropic and OpenAI ahead of anticipated IPOs.
content: Not only do Chinese models perform many of the same tasks for a fraction of the cost of U.S. versions, their prospective flotations may dilute the appetite for mega-IPOs like Anthropic and OpenAI.

zh.title: 随着人工智能霸权争夺加剧，特朗普政府据报考虑禁止中国AI模型
zh.summary: 特朗普政府据报正在考虑禁止中国AI模型，这些模型以美国竞争对手成本的一小部分提供可比的功能。这样的禁令将在预期的IPO之前保护Anthropic和OpenAI等美国AI公司。

title: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
summary: AMD launched Helios, its first rack-scale AI system, and secured Microsoft as a major customer alongside Meta, OpenAI, and Oracle. The win marks significant progress in AMD's challenge to Nvidia's dominance in enterprise AI infrastructure.
content: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system, and has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.

zh.title: AMD推出Helios——其首个机架级AI系统与Nvidia竞争，微软成为最新买家
zh.summary: AMD推出了Helios（其首个机架级AI系统），并将微软作为主要客户，与Meta、OpenAI和Oracle一起。这一胜利标志着AMD在挑战Nvidia在企业AI基础设施中的主导地位方面取得了重大进展。

title: Scared of the AI trade? Here are three investment themes Goldman Sachs is offering instead.
summary: As semiconductor stocks enter a bear market, Goldman Sachs identifies three alternative investment themes for AI-exposed portfolios without direct chip concentration. The shift reflects investor caution about elevated valuations and potential chip demand slowdown.
content: Semiconductors have fallen into a bear market, prompting some investors to look elsewhere

zh.title: 害怕AI交易？这是高盛提供的三个替代投资主题
zh.summary: 随着半导体股票进入熊市，高盛为AI敞口投资组合确定了三个替代投资主题，避免直接的芯片集中度。这一转变反映了投资者对估值过高和潜在芯片需求放缓的谨慎态度。

title: ‘I am at a loss’: My brother is dying. We are not close. What responsibility do I have to help him?
summary: A person seeks guidance on supporting a dying sibling with whom they were never close, especially as cognitive decline worsens communication. The dilemma highlights tensions between family obligation and emotional distance in end-of-life care.
content: “He is now no longer able to think clearly or communicate his wishes.”

zh.title: "我很困惑":我的兄弟姐妹即将去世。我们不亲近。我有什么责任帮助他?
zh.summary: 一个人寻求关于如何支持一位与自己不亲近的垂死兄弟姐妹的指导,尤其是当认知能力下降恶化了沟通。这个困境凸显了在生命终结关怀中,家庭义务和情感距离之间的紧张关系。

title: Domino’s shares jump as franchise store operators spend more on ingredients
summary: Domino's stock jumped 7% after beating Q2 revenue expectations by 2.5%, driven by increased ingredient spending from franchise operators. The results suggest strong consumer demand and operational momentum across the pizza chain's network.
content: The pizza chain’s stock jumped about 7% in premarket trading after revenue was around 2.5% higher than analysts’ estimates for the second quarter.

zh.title: 多米诺骨牌股价上涨,因加盟店经营者增加食材支出
zh.summary: 多米诺骨牌股票在第二季度收入超预期2.5%后上涨7%,由加盟店经营者增加的食材支出推动。这些结果表明消费者需求强劲,整个披萨连锁店网络的运营势头良好。

title: U.S. Treasury yields edge higher as Wall Street monitors Middle East tensions
summary: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield rose to 4.558% as Wall Street monitors escalating Middle East tensions. The modest increase reflects market concerns about geopolitical risk and its potential economic impact.
content: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 1 basis point to 4.558%.

zh.title: 美国国债收益率小幅上升,华尔街关注中东局势
zh.summary: 随着华尔街监控中东局势升级,10年期美国国债收益率升至4.558%。这种小幅上升反映了市场对地缘政治风险及其潜在经济影响的担忧。

title: Ryanair says 'no shortage' of travellers despite Iran war denting profit
summary: Ryanair's first-quarter profit dropped 34% as Middle East tensions delayed travel bookings, though the airline maintains strong underlying demand remains. Competitors face a difficult winter as geopolitical concerns continue suppressing bookings.
content: Ryanair's first-quarter profit took a 34% hit as consumers delayed bookings due to the Middle East crisis, while struggling airlines face a "difficult winter."

zh.title: 瑞安航空称尽管伊朗战争影响利润，旅客仍"不缺乏"
zh.summary: 由于中东地区紧张局势导致旅游预订延迟，瑞安航空第一季度利润下降34%，但该航空公司仍保持强劲的潜在需求。随着地缘政治担忧继续抑制预订，竞争对手正面临困难的冬季。

title: Chip stocks just had their worst week in over a year. Is now the time to buy?
summary: Semiconductor stocks posted their worst week in over a year, sparking debate about whether the selloff represents a buying opportunity. Analysts note strong fundamentals persist due to ongoing capex trends and persistent chip bottlenecks.
content: There's a lot of 'gas left in the tank' as capex trends and chip bottlenecks persist, Mizuho's Vijay Rakesh said.

zh.title: 芯片股刚经历一年多来最糟糕的一周。现在是买入时机吗?
zh.summary: 半导体股票经历了一年多来最差的一周，引发了关于此次抛售是否代表买入机会的讨论。分析师指出，由于持续的资本支出趋势和持续的芯片供应短缺，基本面仍然保持强势。

title: Voters wary of government ownership in companies as Trump administration takes equity stakes
summary: A CNBC poll shows roughly half of voters oppose government equity stakes in private companies as the Trump administration takes positions in various firms. The finding reflects broader voter concern about government market intervention and industrial policy.
content: About half of voters believe it isn't appropriate for the U.S. government to own stakes in companies, a new CNBC poll found.

zh.title: 特朗普政府获取公司股权之际，选民对政府所有权持谨慎态度
zh.summary: 美国全国广播公司财经频道的民调显示，当特朗普政府在各家公司中获得股权时，大约一半的选民反对政府在私营公司中持有股权。该调查反映了选民对政府市场干预和产业政策的更广泛关切。

title: How Social Security is calculated — and how to make sure you have enough money in retirement
summary: Social Security benefits depend on lifetime earnings history and the age at which recipients claim, making strategic planning crucial for retirement. Understanding benefit calculation mechanics helps workers optimize payouts and ensure adequate retirement income.
content: Your Social Security check will depend on your lifetime earnings and when you claim. Learn how the Social Security Administration calculates your benefits.

zh.title: 社会保障如何计算 — 以及如何确保您在退休时有足够的钱
zh.summary: 社会保障福利取决于终身收入历史和领取人索赔时的年龄，使战略规划对退休至关重要。了解福利计算机制有助于工作者优化支付并确保充分的退休收入。

title: Burnham promises help with your money. How could it affect you?
summary: New UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham pledges to make life more affordable for citizens but specific policy mechanisms remain undefined. The article explores potential approaches and their implications for household economics.
content: New Prime Minister Andy Burnham says he wants life to be more affordable, but how could he do it?

zh.title: 伯恩汉姆承诺帮助您的资金。这会如何影响您？
zh.summary: 新任英国首相安迪·伯恩汉姆承诺为公民提供更加负担得起的生活，但具体政策机制仍未明确。该文章探讨了潜在的方法及其对家庭经济学的影响。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: Jim Cramer's top 10 market watch items feature rising semiconductor stocks and Bristol Myers' investment in Nvidia chips for AI drug discovery. The activity signals renewed optimism in tech infrastructure spending and AI applications.
content: Semiconductor stocks are higher, and Bristol Myers is buying new Nvidia chips for AI drug discovery.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默周一股市关注的10大事项
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默的前10大市场关注项目包括半导体股票上升以及百时美施贵宝对英伟达芯片在人工智能药物发现中的投资。这项活动表明对科技基础设施支出和人工智能应用的乐观情绪重新激发。

title: Jobs, benefits and taxes: What Andy Burnham means for your finances
summary: Andy Burnham's ascension to leadership marks a change in the UK's political direction, though fiscal challenges persist regardless of who leads. The article examines how his policies may affect household finances through jobs, benefits and taxation. This matters as individuals assess how leadership transitions impact their personal financial wellbeing.
content: The person in charge of the country will change but the financial challenges remain the same.

zh.title: 工作、福利和税收：安迪·伯纳姆对你的财务意味着什么
zh.summary: 安迪·伯纳姆的领导地位确立标志着英国政治方向的改变，但无论由谁领导，财政挑战依然存在。该文章探讨了他的政策如何通过就业、福利和税收影响家庭财务。这对个人评估领导层更替对其个人财务福祉的影响具有重要意义。

title: Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs sells $55 million Miami mansion he tried to use for bail
summary: Sean "Diddy" Combs sold a $55 million Miami mansion he had attempted to use as collateral for bail in his ongoing sex-trafficking case. The property was disposed of while Combs remained incarcerated, representing a major asset liquidation tied to his legal troubles. This signals potential changes in his financial posture as the high-profile criminal case proceeds.
content: Disgraced music mogul Sean “Diddy” Combs has finally sold the Miami mansion he once put up as collateral in his failed bid for bail in his sex-trafficking case. It was sold for $55 million while he was behind bars.

zh.title: 肖恩·迪迪·康布斯出售5500万美元迈阿密豪宅，该豪宅曾被他用于保释担保
zh.summary: 肖恩·迪迪·康布斯出售了一套价值5500万美元的迈阿密豪宅，他曾试图将其作为其性贩运案保释的担保。这处房产在康布斯被监禁期间被出售，代表了与其法律问题相关的重大资产清算。这表明随着这起备受关注的刑事案件继续进行，他的财务状况可能会发生变化。

title: ‘Full House’ creator Jeff Franklin relists $45 million Beverly Hills home built on site of Manson murders
summary: Jeff Franklin, creator of "Full House," has relisted his $45 million Beverly Hills mansion for sale, a property historically linked to Charles Manson's infamous murders. The difficulty in securing a buyer reflects the property's notorious historical association despite its luxury status and prestigious location. This illustrates how dark history can impede real estate sales even at the highest price points.
content: “Full House” creator Jeff Franklin is once again on the hunt for a buyer for his Beverly Hills mansion which has sinister ties to the Charles Manson murders.

zh.title: 《欢乐满屋》创作者杰夫·富兰克林重新上市4500万美元的比弗利山庄豪宅，该豪宅建在曼森谋杀案遗址上
zh.summary: 《欢乐满屋》创作者杰夫·富兰克林重新上市其价值4500万美元的比弗利山庄豪宅，该房产历史上与查尔斯·曼森的臭名昭著谋杀案相关。尽管该房产具有奢华地位和享誉盛名的地理位置，但难以找到买家反映了其臭名昭著的历史关联。这说明了即使在最高价格点，黑暗历史也会阻碍房地产销售。

title: Boeing CEO says company still needs 'a couple more years' to repair finances before new jet
summary: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg indicated the aerospace company requires several more years to stabilize its finances before developing a successor aircraft to its bestselling 737 MAX. The statement prioritizes financial recovery and existing business stabilization over pursuing new product development. This suggests Boeing's challenges remain more pressing than innovation timelines.
content: CEO Kelly Ortberg signalled Boeing is focused more on stabilizing its existing business than rushing to develop a successor to its best-selling 737 MAX.

zh.title: 波音CEO表示公司在开发新喷气机之前还需要"再花几年时间"修复财务
zh.summary: 波音CEO凯利·奥特伯格表示，这家航空航天公司需要再花数年时间才能稳定财务，然后才能开发畅销机型737 MAX的后继机型。该声明将财务恢复和现有业务稳定放在优先于追求新产品开发的位置。这表明波音的挑战仍然比创新时间表更为紧迫。

title: Ryanair profits drop as Iran war puts off passengers and lifts fuel costs
summary: Ryanair reported declining profits as geopolitical tensions related to Iran's conflict reduced passenger demand and elevated fuel costs, with Brent crude oil climbing above $90 per barrel. The airline industry faces dual headwinds from both demand suppression and operational cost increases. This demonstrates how geopolitical events directly impact aviation profitability.
content: The Irish airline said oil prices had increased costs meanwhile Brent crude surpassed $90.

zh.title: 由于伊朗战争使乘客望而却步并提高燃油成本，瑞安航空利润下降
zh.summary: 瑞安航空报告利润下降，原因是与伊朗冲突相关的地缘政治紧张局势减少了乘客需求并提高了燃油成本，布伦特原油涨至每桶90美元以上。航空业面临需求抑制和运营成本增加的双重压力。这表明地缘政治事件如何直接影响航空业的盈利能力。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Burnham set to take helm of 'poverty stricken disaster,' says Trump
summary: Britain's new Prime Minister Andy Burnham faces immediate pressure from President Trump to expand North Sea oil production as his government assumes office. Trump characterized the UK's economic situation harshly while advocating for increased fossil fuel development. This reflects ongoing transatlantic tensions over energy policy and economic priorities.
content: Britain's new Prime Minister Andy Burnham faces instant pressure from President Trump to "open up" North Sea oil.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：特朗普说伯纳姆将接管"贫困破败的灾难"
zh.summary: 英国新首相安迪·伯纳姆在其政府上台时面临来自美国总统特朗普的直接压力，要求扩大北海石油生产。特朗普严厉评价了英国的经济形势，同时倡导增加化石燃料开发。这反映了围绕能源政策和经济优先事项的持续跨大西洋紧张局势。

title: From 'Super El Niño' to Europe’s extreme heatwave: How this year's weather shocks are rattling commodity markets
summary: Extreme weather events, including a "Super El Niño" and Europe's intense heatwaves, are creating significant volatility in commodity markets while analysts warn financial institutions underestimate climate's economic impact. These climate shocks affect prices across multiple asset classes from agriculture to energy. The article underscores the growing interconnection between physical climate risks and global financial stability.
content: Markets are underestimating the impact of climate volatility on a range of asset classes, commodity strategists say.

zh.title: 从"超级厄尔尼诺"到欧洲极端热浪：今年的气候异常如何扰动商品市场
zh.summary: 包括"超级厄尔尼诺"和欧洲强烈热浪在内的极端天气事件正在造成商品市场出现重大波动，同时分析人士警告金融机构低估了气候的经济影响。这些气候冲击涉及从农业到能源等多个资产类别的价格。该文章强调了物理气候风险与全球金融稳定之间日益增强的联系。

title: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
summary: FIFA generated over $9 billion in revenue from the 2026 World Cup, described as the most lucrative sporting event in history, substantially benefiting the governing body. The tournament's record profitability reflects expanding commercial partnerships, broadcast rights and sponsorship deals. This demonstrates FIFA's growing financial power despite ongoing controversies surrounding the organization.
content: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.

zh.title: 国际足联以90亿美元成为有史以来最大规模世界杯的赢家
zh.summary: 国际足联从2026年世界杯中产生了超过90亿美元的收益，该赛事被誉为历史上利润最高的运动赛事，该管理机构因此获得了巨大收益。赛事创纪录的盈利反映了商业合作伙伴、电视转播权和赞助协议的扩展。尽管围绕该组织存在持续争议，这仍然证明了国际足联日益增长的财务实力。

title: Former academy pupil offers students free haircuts
summary: Razwan Amin, a former Erdington Academy student, has established a barber shop offering free haircuts to help community members cope with rising living costs. His initiative represents grassroots economic relief as individuals struggle with inflation and affordability challenges. This example illustrates how micro-level entrepreneurship can address immediate local hardship.
content: Razwan Amin set up his barbers after leaving Erdington Academy and wants to help people with the cost of living.

zh.title: 前学院学生为学生提供免费理发服务
zh.summary: 埃丁顿学院前学生拉兹万·阿明开设了一家理发店，为社区成员提供免费理发以帮助他们应对生活成本上升。他的举措代表了基层经济救助，因为个人正在为通货膨胀和可负担性问题而苦恼。这个例子说明了微观层面的创业如何能够解决直接的本地困难。

title: Russia pounds Kyiv as NATO military chief warns Moscow would 'lose a lot' by attacking Baltics
summary: Russia intensified attacks on Kyiv while NATO's military leadership warned Moscow against expanding conflict into the Baltic region, which could trigger direct NATO involvement. Heavy exchanges of fire represent the conflict's most significant military activity in months and heighten regional security concerns. The escalating tensions threaten to disrupt global energy supplies and expand the conflict beyond Ukraine's borders.
content: Russia and Ukraine traded their heaviest strikes in months, fueling fears of escalation and further strain on oil supplies.

zh.title: 俄罗斯轰炸基辅，北约军事首脑警告莫斯科攻击波罗的海将"付出巨大代价"
zh.summary: 俄罗斯加强了对基辅的攻击，同时北约军事领导层警告莫斯科不要将冲突扩展到波罗的海地区，这可能引发北约的直接参与。激烈的火力交换代表了数月来冲突中最重大的军事活动，加剧了地区安全关切。升级的局势威胁到全球能源供应，并可能将冲突扩展到乌克兰边界之外。

title: 'Give me my money back': South Korean traders' leveraged SK Hynix, Samsung bets unravel after selloff
summary: South Korean retail investors endured substantial losses as shares of Samsung and SK Hynix experienced sharp reversals, unwinding leveraged positions taken on these semiconductor stocks. The sharp selloff undermined bets by individual traders using borrowed capital to amplify their exposure. This event highlights the risks retail investors face when using leverage during volatile market conditions.
content: South Korean retail investors suffer heavy losses after Samsung and SK Hynix shares reverse sharply.

zh.title: "把钱还给我"：韩国交易员杠杆SK海力士和三星的赌注在抛售后瓦解
zh.summary: 韩国散户投资者遭受巨大损失，因为三星和SK海力士股票经历了急剧反转，解除了这些半导体股票上的杠杆头寸。急剧抛售打击了使用借入资本来扩大敞口的个人交易员的赌注。这一事件突出了散户投资者在波动市场条件下使用杠杆时面临的风险。

title: China's Zhongji Innolight sees shares surge after Hong Kong listing approval
summary: China's Zhongji Innolight received Hong Kong listing approval and is positioned to complete the year's largest IPO on the exchange, exceeding Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion offering. The listing reflects strong investor appetite for Chinese technology companies despite broader market uncertainties. This development strengthens Hong Kong's status as a major capital formation hub for mainland enterprises.
content: The deal size will exceed Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion IPO earlier this month, making it the largest listing in Hong Kong this ​year.

zh.title: 中国中际光电在获得香港上市批准后股价飙升
zh.summary: 中国中际光电获得了香港上市批准，并有望完成今年该交易所最大规模的首次公开募股，超过Luxshare Precision的31亿美元募股。该上市反映了投资者对中国科技公司的强烈兴趣，尽管存在更广泛的市场不确定性。这一发展加强了香港作为内地企业主要融资中心的地位。

title: Oil prices rise, stock futures flat as fighting between U.S. and Iran intensifies
summary: Oil prices climbed on Sunday as U.S.-Iran tensions escalated in the Middle East, while stock-index futures remained flat. The market is closely watching developments in the region and awaiting significant tech earnings reports this week.
content: Oil prices rose while U.S stock-index futures were little changed on Sunday, amid an escalation of fighting in the Middle East and as investors await key tech earnings this week.

zh.title: 油价上升，美伊冲突升级之际股指期货持平
zh.summary: 随着美伊在中东地区紧张局势升级，油价周日上涨，而股指期货保持平稳。市场密切关注该地区局势发展，同时等待本周重大科技收益报告发布。

title: U.S. hits Iran for ninth consecutive night as American casualties rise
summary: The United States conducted its ninth consecutive night of military strikes against Iran as part of an escalating campaign to neutralize Tehran's capability to obstruct shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. American casualties have risen amid the intensifying military operations.
content: The U.S. began a ninth straight night of strikes against Iran, escalating a campaign to destroy Tehran's ability to disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国连续第九晚打击伊朗，美方伤亡人数上升
zh.summary: 美国进行了连续第九晚对伊朗的军事打击，这是一项升级的行动，目的是消除德黑兰阻碍霍尔木兹海峡航运能力。在日益激烈的军事行动中，美方伤亡人数上升。

title: Samsung Biologics to acquire Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group in $1.8 billion all-cash deal
summary: Samsung Biologics announced an all-cash acquisition of Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group for $1.8 billion, marking a significant expansion of the South Korean company's pharmaceutical capabilities.
content: South Korea's Samsung Biologics said on Monday that it had made an all-cash bid of 1.46 billion Swiss francs ($1.8 billion) for Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group.

zh.title: 三星生物技术以18亿美元全现金收购瑞士多肽集团
zh.summary: 三星生物技术公司宣布以18亿美元全现金收购瑞士多肽集团，标志着这家韩国公司制药能力的重大扩展。

title: Stock futures are little changed after Wall Street suffers losing week: Live updates
summary: Stock futures were little changed as Wall Street concluded a losing week, with the three major market averages posting declines.
content: The three major averages posted weekly losses last week.

zh.title: 股票期货基本持平，华尔街经历下跌周
zh.summary: 随着华尔街结束了一个下跌周，三大主要市场平均指数均出现下跌，股票期货基本持平。

title: Brent breaches $90 as Middle East risks mount with U.S-Iran tensions on the rise
summary: Brent crude oil surged past $90 per barrel as Middle East tensions escalated with the U.S. launching its ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets.
content: American forces have started ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets.

zh.title: 中东风险加剧美伊关系紧张，布伦特油价突破90美元
zh.summary: 随着美国对伊朗目标进行第九个连续夜间打击，中东局势升级，布伦特原油油价飙升至每桶90美元以上。

title: TSMC is accelerating Arizona factory buildout to capitalize on AI 'megatrend,' CFO says
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is accelerating its Arizona factory expansion to capitalize on strong AI-driven demand, according to the company's CFO. The investment reflects robust customer demand for advanced chip manufacturing capacity.
content: Speaking in an interview with CNBC, TSMC's Wendell Huang said the fresh investment comes on the back of robust customer demand.

zh.title: 台积电加快亚利桑那工厂建设以抓住人工智能"超级趋势"，首席财务官表示
zh.summary: 台湾半导体制造公司台积电首席财务官表示，该公司正在加快亚利桑那工厂扩建以抓住强劲的人工智能驱动需求。这项投资反映了客户对先进芯片制造能力的强劲需求。

title: Plenty of stocks are working in this market — you just have to look beyond tech
summary: Investment opportunities remain available across the broader market beyond the heavily concentrated technology sector. Analysts question how long investors can continue benefiting from non-tech stocks before recognizing the diversification opportunity.
content: The big unanswered question is how long there can be such terrific opportunities outside tech before it dawns on those overweight the sector.

zh.title: 许多股票在这个市场中表现良好——你只需要超越科技股
zh.summary: 在科技行业高度集中的情况下，投资机会仍然存在于更广泛的市场中。分析师质疑投资者还能从非科技股中受益多久，才能认识到多元化投资的机会。

title: World Cup 2026 final in photos: Spain triumphs as football crowns a new champion
summary: Spain won the 2026 World Cup, defeating Argentina 1-0 in extra time to reclaim football's highest honor. The victory came in a tightly contested final that extended beyond regulation play.
content: Spain reclaimed football's biggest prize on Sunday, defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a tense World Cup final.

zh.title: 2026世界杯决赛照片：西班牙胜利，足球迎来新冠军
zh.summary: 西班牙赢得了2026年世界杯，在加时赛中1:0击败阿根廷，重新赢得足球最高荣誉。这场胜利来自一场势均力敌的决赛，比赛时间延长至常规时间外。
